title: Define Blueprint
expectation: Use a feature-branch worktree under the canonical worktree location as the only mutable surface for this process; never edit blueprint files from the shared repository checkout. Review relevant existing blueprints, including the canonical Agentish sections blueprint when defining or restructuring a subject blueprint, create or update the blueprint layer needed for the task from that worktree branch, and stop before implementation unless the user explicitly asks for implementation.
idlePrompt: If the blueprint work is complete, reply only with 'done: blueprint defined'. If you are truly blocked on missing user information, reply only with 'blocked: blueprint clarification required'. Otherwise resume the blueprint work immediately and make real progress instead of giving only a status update.
